care in Brampton

Our story

Dentistry that feels less like a clinic, more like being cared for.

Inta Dental Care began with a simple idea: that going to the dentist shouldn't be something you dread. Since opening our doors in Brampton, we've built a practice around comfort — soft lighting, unhurried visits, and a team that explains every step before it happens.

Led by Registered Dental Hygienist Harmit Hundal, our dentists and hygienists deliver the full range of family and cosmetic care under one calm roof. Many of our patients have been with us for years — and now bring their kids, too.

Our mission

Gentle, honest care that puts your comfort and long-term health first.

Our vision

To be the family practice Brampton trusts for a lifetime of healthy smiles.

Our values

Kindness, transparency and spotless, uncompromising hygiene.

What we do

Complete care for the whole family.

From a routine polish to a full smile makeover — everything you need, delivered gently and explained clearly.

Why Inta

The little things that make a big difference.

gentle

Gentle by default

Slow, patient, pain-aware treatment — nervous patients are our specialty.

spotless

Spotless hygiene

Impeccable, orderly sterilisation standards on every single visit.

modern

Modern equipment

Up-to-date technology for faster, more comfortable treatment.

clear

Clear explanations

We walk you through every step, so there are no surprises.

playful

Kid-friendly

Calm, playful visits that help children feel safe in the chair.

honest

Fair, honest pricing

Transparent treatment plans and reasonable prices, always.

flexible

Evenings & weekends

Open six days a week to fit around real life.

easy

Accessible & easy

Wheelchair-friendly entrance and free on-site parking.

The people

Meet the team behind your smile.

A close-knit group of dentists, hygienists and assistants — the same familiar faces, visit after visit.

Good to know

Questions, answered.

Can't find what you're looking for? Call us at (647) 780-5620 — we're happy to help.

Yes — we warmly welcome new patients and families of all ages. New here? Just book a first visit and we'll take care of the rest.

We accept most major insurance plans and can help you understand your coverage. We also offer clear, honest treatment plans so there are never surprises.

Absolutely — nervous patients are exactly who we're known for. We go slowly, explain everything before it happens, and never rush. Many patients tell us they finally enjoy visiting.

Yes. We love treating kids and make every visit calm and playful, so children grow up feeling comfortable in the chair.

Call us right away at (647) 780-5620. We do our best to accommodate urgent pain and emergencies as quickly as possible.

We're at 43 Michelangelo Blvd in Brampton, with free on-site parking and a wheelchair-accessible entrance.
